message.content:
Thoroughly explore this codebase to understand its structure, architecture, build system, and development workflow. I need to create a CLAUDE.md file.

1. Check for existing CLAUDE.md, README.md, .cursor/rules/, .cursorrules, .github/copilot-instructions.md
2. Look at package.json (or equivalent build files) for build/test/lint commands
3. Understand the high-level directory structure
4. Identify the tech stack, frameworks, and key architectural patterns
5. Look at key config files (tsconfig, webpack, vite, eslint, etc.)
6. Understand the project type (monorepo? frontend? backend? full-stack?)
7. Look at a few key source files to understand patterns

Be very thorough - check all top-level files and directories.
